unresolved.title: Cadence: Musical Playgrounds is a "time capsule to how games used to be" 13 years in the making
unresolved.summary:
While free-to-play has firmly established itself as the dominant force in mobile games, even in 2026 there remain those outliers that opt for the traditional one-time payment approach.

Many are experimental indie titles, charging upfront to remain unburdened by the friction of gameplay versus monetisation. Some are made by one solo developer, focused on a personal, creative vision rather than the compromises of a committee. ... [ MORE ]

unresolved.title: Apple updates App Store age rating questionnaire with social media questions

Apple has updated the age rating questionnaire in App Store Connect to include new questions about apps' social media capabilities ahead of changes arriving later this year.

The update supports the new Time Allowances feature coming to iOS 27, iPadOS 27 and macOS 27, or later, which gives parents more ways to manage the time their children spend in apps across categories including entertainment, games and social media. ... [ MORE ]

unresolved.title: New Zealand game studios grow revenue 17% to $829m with rebate support
unresolved.summary:
New Zealand's game development studios generated a combined $829 million in revenue in 2025/26, up 17% year-over-year.

That's according to new data from NZ On Air, which showed that the milestone comes with support from the Game Development Sector Rebate (GDSR) after distributing $21.9m in rebates to 43 studios in 2026 compared to $22.4m distributed in 2025.  ... [ MORE ]

unresolved.title: 10 Most Anticipated Board Games of 2026 and Beyond
unresolved.summary:
Board gaming is determined to make a complete mockery of both my free time and whatever remains of my shelf space. The next wave of tabletop releases includes everything from cooperative pirate campaigns and zombie-infested superhero battles to enormous economic games capable of swallowing an entire afternoon. There are clever two-player adventures, new versions of beloved favourites and enough sprawling campaign games to keep a dedicated group occupied for months. Some of these games build on systems I already know […]

unresolved.title: Why two games media veterans think a "classic old-school style multi-format video games website" will flourish in 2026
unresolved.summary: Times are bleak in the games industry, and they're no less challenging in the media that covers it. Twenty years ago there were dozens of print magazines and hundreds of games websites pumping out daily news, previews and reviews. Those numbers have declined steeply over the following years, and while the pandemic drove a brief spike in audiences and revenues that mirrored that of the wider games market – prompting a short-lived and ill-fated round of consolidation – the media landscape is now dominated by a small number of behemoths, with video influencers increasingly dominating conversation and marketing plans.    Read more

unresolved.title: "The business logic is understandable. The human cost is devastating": The Mobile Mavens on Xbox's restructuring
unresolved.summary:
Microsoft's latest overhaul of Xbox marks one of the biggest strategic resets in the company's history. The company is cutting 3,200 roles through FY27, divesting four studios and is reorganising its leadership.

Alongside the restructuring, Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has outlined an ambitious vision to reach more than one billion daily active users, while King and Mojang are set to report directly to Sharma. ... [ MORE ]

unresolved.title: Cooler Master Launches MasterFan A and M Series Fans for High Static Pressure, Airflow and Low Noise
unresolved.summary:
Cooler Master, a global leader in PC components and thermal management solutions, today launched its MasterFan A Series and MasterFan M Series fans, which have received strong evaluations from Cybenetics Labs, with recognition for excellent airflow and static pressure. Among all 120mm fans evaluated by Cybenetics to date, MasterFan A120 and M120 ranked among the strongest performers, especially in static pressure generation, earning the highest Diamond rating. MasterFan A Series and MasterFan M Series are available now in 120mm formats; 140mm will be available at a later date. For more information, visit CoolerMaster.com The MasterFan A Series was developed around Cooler Master’s continued focus on its […]
